textContent:
Hello Sir, I have realized that what I said about your policies being anti-student was a bit of an exaggeration and have realized that, yes, I did pass the probset late. 

On my end, however, I did do the probset on time. But I do recognize my mistake of passing it late, and am accepting the consequences of this mistake.
textContentHtml:
Hello Sir, I have realized that what I said about your policies being anti-student was a bit of an exaggeration and have realized that, yes, I did pass the probset late. 


On my end, however, I did do the probset on time. But I do recognize my mistake of passing it late, and am accepting the consequences of this mistake.
